plan.title: Plan - ACM Onboarding Migration
plan.objective: Replace the legacy agents-template bootstrap in soundspan with a working ACM onboarding flow, convert agent-facing contract files, and preserve legacy planning history by making current, deferred, and archived plans retrievable through ACM.
in_scope: Replace template-managed onboarding surfaces with ACM-native repo contract files.
Soundspan has ACM-native `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `.acm/acm-rules.yaml`, `.acm/acm-tags.yaml`, and `.acm/acm-tests.yaml` wired for this repo.
Preserve legacy plan state during the migration.
Current and deferred plans are mirrored into ACM work tracking, and archived/current/deferred legacy plan files are retrievable through ACM indexing.
out_of_scope: Do not change soundspan product behavior outside repository governance/onboarding surfaces, and do not discard legacy plan artifacts until ACM indexing and import verification show that the migration landed cleanly.

tasks.summary: Define soundspan ACM repo contract and supporting ACM files
acceptance_criteria: Root `AGENTS.md` and `CLAUDE.md` describe the ACM workflow for soundspan
`.acm/acm-rules.yaml`, `.acm/acm-tags.yaml`, and `.acm/acm-tests.yaml` exist with soundspan-specific content
Legacy template surfaces that would confuse onboarding are removed or redirected

tasks.summary: Install and align Claude ACM command assets for this repo
acceptance_criteria: Repo-local Claude command assets exist for ACM workflow
Tracked ignore rules allow the intended Claude assets to remain in the repo
Claude companion docs map back to the root ACM contract

tasks.summary: Bootstrap ACM and import legacy plan state
acceptance_criteria: ACM bootstrap/sync/health run successfully for `soundspan`
Legacy plan files are indexed for retrieval
Current/deferred plans are mirrored into ACM work plans with useful tasks and metadata

tasks.summary: Verify the migration and capture review findings
acceptance_criteria: ACM health and targeted retrieval/import checks pass or are explained
Soundspan repo diff is reviewed with an xhigh codex pass
Residual risks and any follow-up cleanup are documented

tasks.summary: Run verification for resumed soundspan work
acceptance_criteria: Run the repo-defined ACM verification tests before completion.

pre_spec_outline.purpose_goals: Replace the legacy agents-template bootstrap in soundspan with a working ACM onboarding flow, convert agent-facing contract files, and preserve legacy planning history by making current, deferred, and archived plans retrievable through ACM.
pre_spec_outline.non_goals: Do not change soundspan product behavior outside repository governance/onboarding surfaces, and do not discard legacy plan artifacts until ACM indexing and import verification show that the migration landed cleanly.

spec_outline.summary: Migrate soundspan from the agents-template governance stack to ACM by replacing root agent contracts, seeding ACM repo-local rules/tags/tests, wiring Claude command assets, and importing legacy planning artifacts in a way that keeps active work resumable and archived plans retrievable.

full_spec_outline.objective: Replace template-managed onboarding surfaces with ACM-native repo contract files.
full_spec_outline.deliverable: Soundspan has ACM-native `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `.acm/acm-rules.yaml`, `.acm/acm-tags.yaml`, and `.acm/acm-tests.yaml` wired for this repo.
acceptance_criteria: Root agent instructions point to ACM task flow instead of agents-template bootstrap
ACM rules, tags, and verification definitions exist and reflect soundspan-specific constraints
Bootstrap/sync/health can run against the repo without manual repair

full_spec_outline.objective: Preserve legacy plan state during the migration.
full_spec_outline.deliverable: Current and deferred plans are mirrored into ACM work tracking, and archived/current/deferred legacy plan files are retrievable through ACM indexing.
acceptance_criteria: ACM can surface active migrated plans for soundspan
Legacy plan artifacts remain available for retrieval after onboarding
Migration process is documented well enough to rerun safely

refined_spec.summary: Use a hybrid migration: convert the live repo-facing contract to ACM, seed soundspan-specific ACM rules/tags/tests from current repo conventions, install Claude ACM command assets, bootstrap ACM with gitignore disabled once so ignored legacy plan files are discoverable, then mirror current/deferred plan state into ACM work plans while leaving archived plans indexed as historical artifacts instead of cluttering the active work list.

full_refined_spec.decision: Store active current/deferred plan state in ACM work plans, but preserve archived plans through ACM indexing rather than active work rows.
full_refined_spec.rationale: ACM `get_context` returns active work plans; importing archived plans as live work rows would pollute the active plan surface, while indexed archived artifacts remain fetchable without crowding execution context.
acceptance_criteria: Current/deferred plan state is visible through ACM work tracking
Archived plan history remains fetchable without appearing as active work
Migration does not depend on mutating ACM internals directly

full_refined_spec.decision: Retire template-managed agent bootstrap files and scripts from the primary workflow, but keep useful repo documentation/content unless it must change to support ACM.
full_refined_spec.rationale: The migration target is ACM governance, not a broad deletion pass. Useful docs can stay as repo knowledge while the control plane moves from `.agents-config`/template scripts to `.acm` and ACM commands.
acceptance_criteria: Soundspan’s primary onboarding path is ACM-native
Obsolete template-managed surfaces are removed or clearly deprecated
Useful non-governance docs are preserved unless ACM requires replacement

implementation_plan.summary: Convert the repo contract and ACM config first, wire Claude assets second, then bootstrap/index/import legacy planning state and verify the resulting ACM health/context surfaces.
